headline: Trezor Adds USDt, USDC Yield with Morpho Debut

article.title: Trezor adds native USDt, USDC yield via Morpho integration
article.summary: The feature lets users earn stablecoin yield directly through Trezor Suite without connecting external wallets or using separate DeFi apps.

headline: France Firm Dumps $10M Bitcoin Holdings Immediately

article.title: French company abandons crypto treasury strategy, will liquidate Bitcoin holdings
article.summary: In the year since Sequans Communications announced that it would adopt a digital asset treasury strategy, the price of Bitcoin fell by more than 30%.

headline: Treasuries Surge 2% as Oil Prices Drop 5%

article.title: Treasuries Rise as Optimism for US-Iran Deal Trims Oil Prices
article.summary: Treasuries rose after reports that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a truce and work toward ending a three-month war that’s ignited an oil-driven surge in inflation.

headline: Gold Surges 2% on US-Iran Deal Hopes

article.title: Gold Rises as Reports of US-Iran Deal Eases Bets on Higher Rates
article.summary: Gold rose after reports that Iran and the US reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward an agreement to end the Middle East war, pending final approval from US President Donald Trump.

headline: AAPL Plunges 5% on AI Overhaul Plans

article.title: Apple iOS 27 Leaks: Siri Is Being Remade to Be More Like ChatGPT
article.summary: Rendered illustrations published ahead of WWDC 2026 reveal a dedicated Siri app, Dynamic Island integration, and a Google Gemini backbone—the biggest overhaul to the assistant in nearly 15 years.

headline: Kalshi Challenges $1M Minnesota Prediction Market Block

article.title: Kalshi Sues to Stop Minnesota From Enforcing America’s First Prediction Market Ban
article.summary: Prediction market giant Kalshi has asked a federal judge to prevent Minnesota from allowing the ban to go into effect in August.

headline: Crypto Sector Urges $1T Clarity Act Passage Now

article.title: The Digital Chamber ramps up pressure on Congress with call to action to pass Clarity Act
article.summary: The Digital Chamber published a website to serve as a central spot for people to write to lawmakers in its latest push to pass a crypto bill.

headline: Kalshi Sues Minnesota Over $1B Market Threat

article.title: Kalshi’s turn: Prediction markets platform sues Minnesota over law going into effect in August
article.summary: Following the CFTC's suit, Kalshi has sued the state of Minnesota after Governor Tim Walz signed a law blocking prediction markets.
